message:
fix(lua): lua_to_resp stops at first nil in table array (match Redis)

Redis stops iterating the Lua table sequence at the first nil value
when converting back to a RESP array. Previously we converted all
elements including nil holes, producing arrays like [1, nil, 3]
instead of [1].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
